name: @aily-project/lib-dfrobot-ct1780
nickname_zh_cn: CT1780 K 型高温传感器
nickname_zh_hk: CT1780 K 型高溫感測器
author: Vonweller
description: CT1780 是 1-Wire K 型高温传感器，可搜索总线上的探头，读取摄氏温度，并读取拨码配置地址，支持多个模块级联。
description_zh_cn: CT1780 是 1-Wire K 型高温传感器，可搜索总线上的探头，读取摄氏温度，并读取拨码配置地址，支持多个模块级联。
description_en: Aily Blockly library for the DFRobot CT1780 1-Wire K-type high-temperature sensor, supporting device search, Celsius temperature reading, DIP-switch configuration address reading, and cascaded modules. Bundles OneWire.
description_zh_hk: CT1780 是 1-Wire K 型高溫感測器，可搜尋匯流排上的探頭，讀取攝氏溫度，並讀取撥碼設定地址，支援多個模組級聯。
description_ja: Aily Blockly library for the DFRobot CT1780 1-Wire K-type high-temperature sensor, supporting device search, Celsius temperature reading, DIP-switch configuration address reading, and cascaded modules. Bundles OneWire.
description_ko: Aily Blockly library for the DFRobot CT1780 1-Wire K-type high-temperature sensor, supporting device search, Celsius temperature reading, DIP-switch configuration address reading, and cascaded modules. Bundles OneWire.
